zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Eglinton於1340年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧時，她的父親Sir Hugh Eglinton30歲，母親Egidia Stewart20歲。她於1362年之前與John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham在蘇格蘭雷福福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1398年在她的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Eglinton于1340年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Eglinton30岁，母亲Egidia Stewart20岁。她于1362年之前与John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham在苏格兰雷福福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1398年在她的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰雷福福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Eglinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Scottish: locative name from Eglinton in Kilwinning (Ayrs). This is the usual source of the surname.

variants.name: Eggleton
meanings: English: habitational name from Eggleton (Herefordshire) or Egleton (Rutland), both named in Old English as ‘settlement associated with Ecgwulf or Ecgel’.

variants.name: Eglington
meanings: 1 English: perhaps a variant of Eggleton . Note that Eggleton (Herefs) is recorded as Eglingtone in 1212.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Eglinton was born in 1340, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh Eglinton, was 30 and her mother, Egidia Stewart, was 20. She married John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham before 1362, in Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1398, in her hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Eglinton est née en 1340, à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Eglinton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Egidia Stewart, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham avant 1362, à Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1398, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Eglinton 1340 in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Eglinton 30 und ihre Mutter Egidia Stewart 20. Sie hat vor 1362 in Renfrewshire, Scotland John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1398 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Eglinton è nata il nel 1340 nel Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Hugh Eglinton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Egidia Stewart, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham prima del 1362, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1398, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Eglintonが1340年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Eglintonは30歳，母Egidia Stewartは20歳であった。1362年以前にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアでJohn Montgomery 10th Lord of Eagleshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1398年に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Eglinton(이)가 1340년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Eglinton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia Stewart(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1362년 이전 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1398년 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Eglinton nasceu em 1340, em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh Eglinton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Stewart, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham antes 1362, em Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1398, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Eglinton родилась в 1340 г. в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Eglinton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Egidia Stewart, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham перед 1362 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1398 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Eglinton nació en 1340, en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Hugh Eglinton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Egidia Stewart, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Montgomery 10th Lord of Eaglesham antes de 1362, en Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1398, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
